ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "size_class_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size class ID */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle type ID */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Engine size in liters */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., front-wheel, rear-wheel, all-wheel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiencies" (
  "efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle ID */,
  "fuel_efficiency_city" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in city driving conditions */,
  "fuel_efficiency_city_units" TEXT /* Units for city fuel efficiency */,
  "fuel_efficiency_highway" REAL /* Fuel efficiency in highway driving conditions */,
  "fuel_efficiency_highway_units" TEXT /* Units for highway fuel efficiency */,
  "test_cycle" TEXT /* Test cycle used for measurement (e.g., EPA, NHTSA) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiencies_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_detail" TEXT /* Details about the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL for accessing the source */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the source was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_sources" (
  "vehicle_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle-source relation */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle ID */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source ID */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collecting data (e.g., survey, experiment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_sources_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "query_parameters" TEXT /* Query parameters used for filtering data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the trend is associated with */,
  "average_city_efficiency" REAL /* Average city fuel efficiency for that year */,
  "average_highway_efficiency" REAL /* Average highway fuel efficiency for that year */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., EPA, NHTSA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiency_trends_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES vehicles ("year")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "effective_year" INTEGER /* Year the regulation became effective */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "regulation_type" TEXT /* Type of regulation (e.g., federal, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting feedback */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the user */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "parent_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent type ID (for hierarchical classification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_classes" (
  "size_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size class */,
  "size_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the size class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size class */,
  "size_range" TEXT /* Range of sizes for the class (e.g., compact, mid-size) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle ID */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions in grams per mile */,
  "nox_emissions" REAL /* NOx emissions in grams per mile */,
  "pm_emissions" REAL /* PM emissions in grams per mile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle ID */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is based */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_manufacturers" (
  "vehicle_manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle-manufacturer relation */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle ID */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer ID */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_manufacturers_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_manufacturers_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
